meanings.definition: wear or display in an ostentatious or proud manner
examples: she was sporting a new hat
The children frolicked in the garden
the gamboling lambs in the meadows
The toddlers romped in the playroom

meanings.definition: exhibiting or calling for sportsmanship or fair play
examples: a sporting solution of the disagreement

meanings.definition: relating to or used in sports
involving risk or willingness to take a risk
preoccupied with the pursuit of pleasure and especially games of chance
examples: a card-playing son of a bitch
